title: デビュー戦の後に・届け笠松の空へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has successfully completed her debut
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to show people that she's a central-level
talent, she vows to take part in many races and
make her mark.
